Uses of Class
com.hummeling.if97.OutOfRangeException

    • Uses of OutOfRangeException in com.hummeling.if97

      Methods in com.hummeling.if97 that throw OutOfRangeException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      double IF97.compressibilityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Isothermal compressibility as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.compressibilityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.compressibilityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.compressibilityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Isothermal compressibility as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.compressionFactorPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Compression factor (real-gas factor) as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.densityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Density as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.densityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Density as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.densityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Density as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.densityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Density as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.densityPX​(double pressure, double vapourFraction)
      Density as a function of pressure & vapour fraction.
      double IF97.densityTX​(double temperature, double vapourFraction)
      Density as a function of temperature & vapour fraction.
      double IF97.dielectricConstantHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Dielectric constant as a function of specific enthalpy and specific entropy.
      double IF97.dielectricConstantPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.dielectricConstantPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and specific entropy.
      double IF97.dielectricConstantPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Dielectric constant as a function of pressure and temperature.
      double IF97.dielectricConstantRhoT​(double density, double temperature)
      Dielectric constant (relative static dielectric constant or relative static permittivity) as a function of density and temperature.
      double IF97.dynamicViscosityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Dynamic viscosity as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.dynamicViscosityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Dynamic viscosity as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.dynamicViscosityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Dynamic viscosity as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.dynamicViscosityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Dynamic viscosity as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.dynamicViscosityRhoT​(double density, double temperature)
      Dynamic viscosity as a function of density & temperature.
      String IF97.getRegionPT​(double pressure, double temperature)  
      double IF97.heatCapacityRatioHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Heat capacity ratio as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.heatCapacityRatioPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Heat capacity ratio as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.heatCapacityRatioPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Heat capacity ratio as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.heatCapacityRatioPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Heat capacity ratio as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.isentropicExponentHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Isentropic exponent as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isentropicExponentPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Isentropic exponent as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.isentropicExponentPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Isentropic exponent as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isentropicExponentPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Isentropic exponent as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Isobaric cubic expansion coefficient as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Isobaric cubic expansion coefficient as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Isobaric cubic expansion coefficient as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isobaricCubicExpansionCoefficientPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Isobaric cubic expansion coefficient as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.isobaricHeatCapacityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Specific isobaric heat capacity as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isobaricHeatCapacityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Specific isobaric heat capacity as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.isobaricHeatCapacityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Specific isobaric heat capacity as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isobaricHeatCapacityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Specific isobaric heat capacity as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.isochoricHeatCapacityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Specific isochoric heat capacity as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isochoricHeatCapacityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Specific isochoric heat capacity as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.isochoricHeatCapacityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Specific isochoric heat capacity as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.isochoricHeatCapacityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Specific isochoric heat capacity as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.kinematicViscosityHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Kinematic viscosity as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.kinematicViscosityPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Kinematic viscosity as a function of pressure & specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.kinematicViscosityPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Kinematic viscosity as a function of pressure & specific entropy.
      double IF97.kinematicViscosityPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Kinematic viscosity as a function of pressure & temperature.
      double IF97.kinematicViscosityRhoT​(double density, double temperature)
      Kinematic viscosity as a function of density & temperature.
      double IF97.partialDerivativePH​(double pressure, double enthalpy, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and specific enthalpy.
      double IF97.partialDerivativePT​(double pressure, double temperature, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of pressure and temperature.
      double IF97.partialDerivativeRhoT​(double density, double temperature, IF97.Quantity x, IF97.Quantity y, IF97.Quantity z)
      Gets the partial derivative of z with respect to x for constant y in SI units, as a function of density and temperature, valid in region 3 only!
      double IF97.PrandtlHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Prandtl number.
      double IF97.PrandtlPH​(double pressure, double enthalpy)
      Prandtl number.
      double IF97.PrandtlPS​(double pressure, double entropy)
      Prandtl number.
      double IF97.PrandtlPT​(double pressure, double temperature)
      Prandtl number.
      double IF97.pressureHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Pressure as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.refractiveIndexHSLambda​(double enthalpy, double entropy, double wavelength)
      Refractive index as a function of specific enthalpy, specific entropy & wave length.
      double IF97.refractiveIndexPHLambda​(double pressure, double enthalpy, double wavelength)
      Refractive index as a function of pressure, specific enthalpy & wave length.
      double IF97.refractiveIndexPSLambda​(double pressure, double entropy, double wavelength)
      Refractive index as a function of pressure, specific entropy & wave length.
      double IF97.refractiveIndexPTLambda​(double pressure, double temperature, double wavelength)
      Refractive index as a function of pressure, temperature & wave length.
      double IF97.refractiveIndexRhoTLambda​(double density, double temperature, double waveLength)
      Refractive index as a function of density, temperature & wave length.
      double IF97.saturationPressureHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Saturation pressure as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.saturationPressureT​(double temperature)
      Saturation pressure as a function of temperature.
      double IF97.saturationTemperatureHS​(double enthalpy, double entropy)
      Saturation temperature as a function of specific enthalpy & specific entropy.
      double IF97.saturationTemperatureP​(double pressure)
      Saturation temperature as a function of pressure.

      Specific enthalpy as a function of pressure for saturated liquid.
